description_long: This modern house is a spacious, single-story residence with a flat roof and a large, open backyard featuring a swimming pool, wooden deck, and multiple outdoor seating areas. The exterior is characterized by a striking contrast of black and white walls, large glass windows, and sliding doors that provide ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor flow. The property is enclosed by a dark perimeter fence and includes landscaped lawns, palm trees, and a prominent treehouse built around a mature tree. Recreational amenities such as a trampoline, swing set, and a small sports area are visible, making the space family-friendly. The house layout is open-plan, with visible living, dining, and kitchen areas, as well as private bedrooms and bathrooms. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a blend of natural and modern materials.
description: A modern, single-story house with flat roofs, large windows, a spacious backyard with a pool, deck, and recreational amenities, all enclosed by a dark fence. The design features black and white exteriors, open-plan interiors, and landscaped outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance, black and white facade, large windows, and the perimeter fence with a gate.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the open backyard, visible interior rooms, and the treehouse built around a large tree.
description_view_2: The rear view showcases the expansive wooden deck, swimming pool, outdoor seating, and palm trees, emphasizing the house's connection to the backyard.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the pool area, deck, and the open-plan living spaces with large sliding doors leading outside.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide, modern door with a minimal overhang, direct access from the front yard, and no visible porch or steps.
